title: Mystic Frontiers Server
description: Server pack for Mystic Frontiers modpack.
body:
## Mystic Frontiers server pack 
Use this modpack to host a server for [Mystic Frontiers](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mystic-frontiers).

| **Minecraft Version** | **Forge Version** | **Allocated RAM** |
|:--------------------:|:--------------:|:----------------:|
| 1.20.1              | 47.4.0         | 8-10 GB* |

*depends on number of simultaneous players and server render distance

### How to install?
1. Download using Modrinth
2. Open the instance's folder and copy /options/ and /mods/ folders
3. Paste both folders into your Forge server.

Found an issue? report it at [this repo](https://github.com/joaovitorborges/Mystic-Frontiers-Modpack/issues).

## Description and features
Embark on a customized Minecraft adventure with a carefully curated selection of mods. From intense combat and RPG progression to breathtaking world generation and magical artifacts, this collection offers an immersive experience. Encounter legendary creatures, explore perilous dungeons, uncover hidden treasures, forge and wield powerful gear, master magical abilities, face formidable creatures and shape your character’s journey. You can expect:
- ⚔️ Enhanced Combat, Weapons & Spells
- 🧙 RPG Progression & Magical Gear
- 🏰 Exploration, Structures & Dungeons
- 🐉 Diverse Creatures, Mobs & Bosses
- 🌀 Better Movement & Mobility
- ✨ Visual & Performance Upgrades
- 🛠️ Quality of Life Enhancements
- 📦 Custom Content

The server pack includes a few useful mods for servers:
- **EasyAuth** for register and login commands 
- **EasyWhiteList** for offline server whitelisting 
- **Skin Restorer** for applying skins (useful for offline mode servers)
- **chunky** to pregenerate chunks
- **PVP Flagging** to prevent unwanted combat
- **AntiXray**

## Server's player commands

### Login
- **Register**: /register <password> <repeat password>
- **Login**: /login <password>
- **Change password**: /account changePassword <old password> <new password>

### Skins
- **Use a Mojang account skin**: /skin set mojang <mojang username>
- **Use a skin from a link**: /skin set web (classic|slim) "<url>"
  - Quotation marks are required before and after the link
  - Choose between classic or slim
  - Example: /skin set web classic "https://s.namemc.com/i/b84ac9a32c374ef1.png"
- **Remove current skin**: /skin reset

### Claims (land)
- **Claim land**: Open the map (M), select the chunk > right-click > claim selected.
  - The maximum number of chunks per player is 25.
  - Chunks do not need to be adjacent; they can be scattered.
  - To remove a claim, follow the same process.


## Full mod list
For the list of mods on Mystic Frontiers (and what is on server pack only), check this [Google Sheet](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1SSq1ETZdG2Da8c3F199cAPzELVFzXcPvyIIWQNAN0wc/edit?usp=sharing).

<details>
  <summary>External mods credits</summary>

  This modpack includes the following third-party mods not hosted on Modrinth:
- [Tetranomicon](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tetranomicon) by [syrikalis](https://www.curseforge.com/members/syrikalis/projects)

- [Cosmetic armor reworked](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked) by [LainMI](https://www.curseforge.com/members/lainmi/projects)
  
- [Aquaculture 2](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture) by [Shadow](https://www.curseforge.com/members/shadow/projects) 
  
- [Enemy Expansion](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/enemy-expansion) by [InfernalStudios](https://www.curseforge.com/members/infernalstudios/projects)

- [Born in Chaos](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/born-in-chaos) by [Mongoose_Artist](https://www.curseforge.com/members/mongoose_artist/projects)

</details>
